ddls:
CREATE TABLE "aircraft" (
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aircraft */,
  "aircraft_name" TEXT /* Name of the aircraft */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of the aircraft */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the aircraft was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "motion_data" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each motion data entry */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the component in motion */,
  "position" REAL /* Position of the component during the measurement */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the motion */,
  "anomalies" INTEGER /* Number of anomalies detected during the motion */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of data collection */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft component being monitored */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., accelerometer, gyroscope) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor in the aircraft */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., Wing, Aileron) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was installed */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date when the component was last serviced */,
  "aircraft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aircraft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_aircraft_id FOREIGN KEY ("aircraft_id") REFERENCES aircraft ("aircraft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the motion data entry associated with the anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly detected (e.g., Over-speed, Out-of-bounds) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the anomaly resolution (e.g., Open, In Progress, Resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_note_id FOREIGN KEY ("note_id") REFERENCES motion_data ("note_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login purposes */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert associated with the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engineering_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the tool was integrated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration log entry */,
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool integrated */,
  "integration_time" TEXT /* Time of integration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., Success, Failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_logs_tool_id FOREIGN KEY ("tool_id") REFERENCES engineering_tools ("tool_id")
)
